zh.Beerfelden, Erbach, Starkenburg, Hessen,: 格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登
zh.Beerfelden, Strakenburg, Hessen-Darmstat: 格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登

zh.Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deuts: 德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登
zh.lifeSummary: Georg Lang於大約1634年出生在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登。他於1657年與Elisabeth Barth在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登被列為clothmaker and court man。他去世於1694年8月8日在他的家鄉享年61歲，埋葬在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Georg Lang于大约1634年出生在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登。他于1657年与Elisabeth Barth在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登被列为clothmaker and court man。他去世于1694年8月8日在他的家乡享年61岁，埋葬在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Lang
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, English, German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic); Swedish (also Lång): nickname for a tall person, from Older Scots, Middle English, Middle High German, Middle Dutch, and Danish lang ‘long’, Swedish lång. The surname of (Middle High) German origin is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, Hungary, Poland, Slovakia, Croatia, and Slovenia.

Hungarian (Láng): from láng ‘flame’, hence probably a nickname for a passionate person, or a man with a fighting spirit. Alternatively, it may be an indirect occupational name for a smith or someone who worked with fire. This surname is also found in Slovenia, where it is spelled Lang, and in Slovakia, where it is spelled in both ways.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 郎, an ancient term to refer to one's lover or son: (i) from the placename Lang (郎), the name of a city, the living place of Fei Bo, the grandson of the Duke Yi of Lu (ruler of the state of Lu, reigned 815–807  BC ). Some of his descendants later changed their original surname Fei to Lang (郎). (ii) borne by some families from the state of the South Huns (48–216  AD , located in northern China).

variants.name: Laing
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lang  .

variants.name: Langer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Horst, Kurt, Otto, Dieter, Franz, Gerhard, Manfred, Fritz, Siegfried, Alois, Angelika.

German, Dutch, Danish, French (Alsace and Lorraine), and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a tall man, from an inflected form of Lang . In the Franconian dialect of German this was also a term for an unskilled laborer (shortened from Handlanger). Compare Longer and Longie .
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Landgari, composed of the elements lant ‘land, territory’ + gari (from garwa) ‘ready, eager’ or gari ‘spear’.

variants.name: Leng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Chu, Chan, Chea, Chi-Cheng, Gang, Heang, Kao, Leung, Oi, Ping, Shek.  Southeast Asian Sophal, Chhay, Chhun, Da, Hoa, Khuon, Linh, Long, Thao, Loeuth, Oeun, Pheap, Sokheng, Sovann.
English: nickname, either from Middle English leng(e) ‘ling’, for someone who dealt in or was thought to resemble this fish. Compare Pike , Tench , Dace , and other fish names.
English: variant of   Laing  .

variants.name: Lange
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Heinz, Horst, Otto, Wolfgang, Ernst, Helmut, Hermann, Manfred, Reinhold.
German, Scandinavian, and Dutch: variant of   Lang   ‘long’. This surname is also found in Poland and in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare   De Lange  .
French: variant, with fused definite article l', of Ange 2. Compare Longe 1.

variants.name: Langhans
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Markus, Helmut, Wilhelm.
German: distinguishing nickname for a tall man (see   Lang  ) called Hans.

variants.name: Lenger
meanings: German: nickname for a tall man; a variant of   Lang  .

variants.name: Langen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bodo, Gunther, Heinz, Rainer.
German: patronymic from   Lang  .
German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Langel
meanings: Swiss German and East German: from the nickname Langel ‘the tall one’, a diminutive of Lang .
German: habitational name from any of several places called Langel.

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek. See George .

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: Georg Lang was born about 1634, in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany. He married Elisabeth Barth in 1657, in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. His occupation is listed as clothmaker and court man in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse. He died on 8 August 1694, in his hometown, at the age of 61, and was buried in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse.

fr.lifeSummary: Georg Lang est né environ 1634, à Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Allemagne. Il a épousé Elisabeth Barth en 1657, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est clothmaker and court man à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Il est décédé le 8 août 1694, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

de.lifeSummary: Georg Lang wurde um 1634 in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deutschland geboren. Er hat 1657 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen Elisabeth Barth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als clothmaker and court man in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen aufgeführt. Er starb am 8. August 1694 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Georg Lang è nato il circa 1634 nel Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania. Lui sposato Elisabeth Barth nel 1657, nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come clothmaker and court man nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Morì il 8 agosto 1694, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

ja.Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Deuts: ドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデン
ja.lifeSummary: Georg Langは約1634年にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデンで生まれた。1657年にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでElisabeth Barthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。グロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでの職業はclothmaker and court manと記録されている。彼は1694年8月8日に故郷で61歳で死去し，グロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Georg Lang(은)는 대략 1634년 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 태어났다. 그는 1657년 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 Elisabeth Barth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 clothmaker and court man이었다. 그는 1694년 8월 8일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Georg Lang nasceu aproximadamente 1634, em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha. Ele casou-se com Elisabeth Barth em 1657, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como clothmaker and court man em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Ele faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1694, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

ru.lifeSummary: Georg Lang родился около 1634 г. в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия. Он женился на женщине по имени Elisabeth Barth в 1657 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.  Он работал по профессии clothmaker and court man в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен. Он умер 8 августа 1694 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен.

es.lifeSummary: Georg Lang nació aproximadamente 1634, en Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania. Se casó con Elisabeth Barth en 1657, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era clothmaker and court man en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1694, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.
